journal_entry.description: Conversion of 50 preferred shares to 25 common shares
journal_entry.rationale: Preferred shares are reclassified to common shares at carrying value. Preferred share equity is reduced (debit) and common share equity is increased (credit) for the same amount, maintaining total equity.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Share conversion is an equity reclassification: preferred share equity decreases (debit equity, slot e) and common share equity increases (credit equity, slot b). No tax implications as this is an internal equity restructuring with no cash or asset flow.

output_credit_classifier.reason: Share conversion is an equity reclassification: preferred share equity decreases (debit equity, slot e) and common share equity increases (credit equity, slot b). No tax implications as this is an internal equity restructuring with no cash or asset flow.
